name: Venison Burgers
recipeInstructions:
Because venison has so little fat, you'll need to add some for a juicy burger. But don't use deer fat - it tastes bad.
Mix venison, pork, salt and pepper, handling as little as possible.
Heat grill. Brush burgers with vegetable oil and grill about 4 minutes; turn and cook to desired doneness.
Serve on rolls with your choice of condiments.
